about.en: Request is a payments and invoicing protocol for creating, sharing, and settling payment requests on-chain. It is used for crypto invoicing, accounting workflows, and payment infrastructure across supported networks. REQ is the token associated with governance, protocol utility, and ecosystem incentives.
about.es: Request es un protocolo de pagos y facturacion para crear, compartir y liquidar solicitudes de pago on-chain. Se usa para facturacion cripto, flujos contables e infraestructura de pagos en redes compatibles. REQ es el token asociado a gobernanza, utilidad del protocolo e incentivos del ecosistema.
about.ca: Request es un protocol de pagaments i facturacio per crear, compartir i liquidar sollicituds de pagament on-chain. S'usa per a facturacio cripto, fluxos comptables i infraestructura de pagaments en xarxes compatibles. REQ es el token associat a governanca, utilitat del protocol i incentius de l'ecosistema.
